PENGFUNAILONGMOD-NAILONG_STRIKE.title: Nailong Slap
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-NAILONG_DEFEND.title: Belly Hug
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_BOUNCE.title: Belly Bounce
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-PENGFU_COMBO.title: Belly Laugh Combo
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-PENGFU_COMBO.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times.
If in [gold]Laugh[/gold], draw 1 card.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_CUSHION.title: Belly Cushion
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-CURL_UP.title: Curl Up
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-FACE_CHAOS.title: Face Chaos
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_CHARGE.title: Belly Charge
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_CHARGE.descriptio:
If you entered an expression this turn, costs 1 less.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_HUG_CURL.title: Belly Curl
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_HUG_CURL.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have not entered an expression this turn, gain 4 more [gold]Block[/gold].
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-OVERREACTION.title: Overreaction
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_PAD.title: Belly Pad
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SNEEZE_FACE_CHANGE.desc:
Randomly enter [gold]Laugh[/gold] or [gold]Fright[/gold].
If the expression changed, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold].
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-LAUGHING_ENDURE.title: Laugh It Off
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-LAUGHING_ENDURE.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If your expression would reduce Skill Block, ignore that reduction and gain 3 more [gold]Block[/gold].
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SCARED_SMACK.title: Scared Smack
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SCARED_SMACK.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your expression would reduce Attack damage, ignore that reduction and gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-ANGRY_BELLY_SLAP.title: Angry Belly Slap
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-TEARY_BLOCK.title: Teary
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-TEARY_WEAK_AURA.title: Watery Eyes
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EMOTIONAL_BREAKDOWN.des:
Randomly enter an expression.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EXPRESSION_MASKS.title: Expression Pack
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-DEEP_BREATH.title: Deep Breath
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-DEEP_BREATH.description:
Clear your current expression.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-LAUGHING_COUNTER.title: Laugh Counter
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-LAUGHING_COUNTER.descri:
If in [gold]Laugh[/gold] or [gold]Smug[/gold], costs 0.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If in [gold]Laugh[/gold] or [gold]Smug[/gold], draw 1 card.
Enter [gold]Fright[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next time you take attack damage this turn, deal {BounceAwayPower:diff()} damage back.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_CHARGE_ENERGY.des:
Randomly enter an expression.
Gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SOFT_REBOUND.title: Soft Rebound
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SOFT_REBOUND.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next time you take attack damage this turn, deal that much damage back.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-ROLLING_DEFENSE_LINE.de: The first time each turn you enter an expression, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold]; if it is [gold]Fright[/gold] or [gold]Aggrieved[/gold], gain 4 instead.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-UNCONTROLLED_FACE.title: Uncontrolled Face
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-UNCONTROLLED_FACE.descr:
Randomly enter an expression.
If you have entered it this combat, draw 1 card.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SMUG_HIT_STRENGTH.title: Tough Talk
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-SMUG_HIT_STRENGTH.descr: The first time each turn you take attack damage while [gold]Smug[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-FIVE_EMOTIONS.title: Five Emotions
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EMOTION_KALEIDOSCOPE.de: Whenever you enter an expression for the first time this combat, draw 1 card.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EMOTION_EXPLOSION.title: Emotion Explosion
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EMOTION_EXPLOSION.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For each different expression entered this combat, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} more damage.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-HUNDRED_FACES.title: Hundred Faces
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-HUNDRED_FACES.descripti: The first time each turn you enter an expression you have not entered this combat, gain 1 Energy.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-CHANGING_EXPRESSION_PAC:
Randomly enter an expression.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-OUT_OF_CONTROL_PERFORMA: Whenever you randomly enter an expression, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-FACE_MASTER.title: Face Master
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-HUGE_BELLY_REBOUND.desc:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
This turn, whenever you take attack damage, deal that much damage back.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-CRY_TO_LAUGH.title: Cry to Laugh
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EVERYONE_LAUGHS.title: Everyone Cracks
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EVERYONE_LAUGHS.descrip:
Enter [gold]Laugh[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-EMOTIONAL_OVERLOAD.desc:
Randomly enter an expression 2 times.
Gain 1 Energy for each expression entered this combat.
